title: Zacatecoluca Heavy Rain
lead: Zacatecoluca is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of +3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Zacatecoluca is causing significant disruptions. 
 The high humidity of 87% and low wind speed of 4.3 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The CDD of 9.5 GG indicates high energy demand due to the weather conditions.
conclusion: Operational teams should be on high alert to mitigate the effects of this critical event.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to flooding
